# 3DDFA-V3 official-like Windows env for RTX 3060
# Python: 3.8
# Torch: cu113, because cu102 wheels may not support RTX 3060 sm_86 properly.

-f https://download.pytorch.org/whl/torch_stable.html

torch==1.10.0+cu113
torchvision==0.11.1+cu113
torchaudio==0.10.0+cu113

setuptools
wheel
numpy==1.23.5
Pillow==9.5.0
opencv-python==4.9.0.80
scipy
scikit-image
albumentations
ninja
tqdm
matplotlib
imageio
huggingface_hub
Cython
